case_title: PETER PANG VS. ALAN MCCOY et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-27-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-06-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-27-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
DECLARATION OF MORRISON R FONG; RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANG, PETER
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-06-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANG, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOY, ALAN DOES 1 TO 25,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-27-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-28-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-12-2003
